segments.text: By spacing with that stable neutral option, you're able to shut down those kinds of approaches
segments.original_text: ニュートラル安定択を置いていることによってそういうのも刈り取れるというか

segments.text: Neo also has that background—originally a Sonic main before he switched to Corrin
segments.original_text: Neo選手もねもともとソニック使いそのカムイを使う前はソニック使いだったという経歴の持ち主でしたから
そういったところの選手

full_text: By spacing with that stable neutral option, you're able to shut down those kinds of approaches Neo also has that background—originally a Sonic main before he switched to Corrin That kind of player

corrections.original: チューニュートラル安定タック
